💌 From the heart

Every single day with you feels like a celebration.
But today — your birthday — the whole universe pauses
just to say: you are incredibly special.
  • 🌟 May every wish you make today come true
  • 😂 May you laugh until your stomach hurts
  • 🫂 May you always feel loved and seen
  • 🌸 May life bring you flowers in every season
  • 💫 May your dreams bloom bigger than ever
  • 💝 May you know how deeply you are cherished

🎁 Birthday gifts for your soul

Everything you deserve

🌹

Love

A love that is patient, warm, and always there — surrounding you like the sun on a summer morning.

✨

Magic

May every ordinary day hold a little miracle — a perfect song, a golden sunset, a surprise smile.

💪

Strength

The courage to chase every dream and the resilience to rise, no matter what life brings your way.

😊

Joy

A happiness so deep it lives in your bones — the kind that stays even on cloudy days.

🌍

Adventure

New places, new stories, and memories so beautiful they make your heart grow bigger.

💖

You

The greatest gift is you — exactly as you are. Never change the magic that makes you, you.

My dearest Emna,

Every morning I wake up and the first thought in my mind is you.

You make ordinary days feel like magic. Your smile is my favourite thing in the entire world.

I don't just love you — I choose you. Every single day. Forever. 🌹

— Always yours, Firas 💖
